response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video: Identified two songs performed by VTubers. 2. Identified 'GHOST SWEEPER' (cover of Masami Okui/Ghost Sweeper Mikami) and 'ANIMA' (cover of ReoNa, composed by Kegani). 3. Searched for lyrics for both using original composer/artist names (Masami Okui, Kegani/ReoNa). 4. Found and verified full lyrics for both. 5. Mapped scenes based on song transitions and visual cues. 6. Generated JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a musical performance by three VTubers, consisting of two songs: 'GHOST SWEEPER' and 'ANIMA'. The first song is a performance of the opening theme from the anime 'Ghost Sweeper Mikami', and the second is a performance of the song 'ANIMA', originally performed by ReoNa.

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song 'GHOST SWEEPER'. The video features dance choreography on a digital stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Letting my long hair fly,
With a teasing body,
If I jump around this city
In high heels,
Big money coming, yeah!

At the foot of the skyscrapers,
A trap of anachronism,
If it's dangerous, bewildered guys,
I'll send you off to paradise.

From any of my bold techniques,
I'll give you what you like.
Bye bye sadness, and find out,
Because you're a ghost with nowhere to go...
Bye bye sadness, and find out,
I'll find you out right now,
Ghost sweeper!

Sucking marks are fine too, but how about the 'Shintsu-kon' (Spiritual Staff)?
I won't allow selfishness.
I can't let you escape.
Big money coming, yeah!

From a conscious dress,
To a gorgeous life,
It always follows from behind,
That's my style.
Though someone says it's cool,
I will always bring you happiness.
Bye bye sadness, and find out,
Because you're a ghost with nowhere to go...
Bye bye sadness, and find out,
I'll find you out right now,
Ghost sweeper!

Bye bye sadness, and find out,
Because you're a ghost with nowhere to go...
Bye bye sadness, and find out,
I'll find you out right now,
Ghost sweeper!

scenes.description: The performance continues with the song 'ANIMA'. Text on screen identifies 'ANIMA' and the composer '毛蟹 (LIVE LAB.)'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What color is the soul?

If you're going to break, just stay broken
I'm not strong enough
To throw it all away, to run away
Look, my heartbeat is quickening once again
Though I don't know
What is right
Things without shape
Are becoming precious to me
Only words without pretense
are tightly bound

I stumble again, I tumble
Even then, I don't break
What color is the soul?
Just getting hurt, just putting on a brave face
Even then, I want to find it
The shape of the soul
I'm confirming it

Alone at the bottom of the deep earth
Searching for the door and the key
Fairytales are, look
Gone like bubbles, all of them
Only conflicts and afterimages
To the next page
The branches that extend divide
And go on their separate ways
Only lonely memories
Are firmly rooting
I pierce through again, I lose
Even then, I don't give in
Where is my heart? Where is the vessel?
Just left behind and falling off
Even then, I want to convey it
The days of the soul
The will of the soul
Always, always

What color is the soul?
Is it red?
Is it blue?
What color is the soul?
What color is the soul?
What color is it?
What color is it?
Living in a transparent past,
In an opaque tomorrow
What color are you?

I stumble again, I tumble
Even then, I don't break
What color is the soul?
Just getting hurt, just putting on a brave face
Even then, I want to find it
The shape of the soul
I'm confirming it
Always, always, always, always
